summary.zh: 按字符逐步显示短文本，并为辅助技术保留完整内容。
summary.en: Reveal short text character by character while preserving complete accessible text.

definition.zh: 文字像正在输入一样逐字符出现。
definition.en: A text sequence reveals characters at timed intervals to simulate incremental entry.

description.zh: 演示使用较长时长以便观察完整变化；生产界面的即时反馈应收敛到 300ms 内。
description.en: Uses a longer demo duration so the full change stays observable; immediate production UI feedback should stay under 300ms.

purpose.zh: 逐字符显露短文本，模拟输入过程并控制叙事节奏。
purpose.en: Reveal short text character by character to simulate typing and pace a narrative moment.

frequency.zh: 只用于低频短句、演示或品牌时刻；说明文字和任务文本完整显示。
frequency.en: Reserve for low-frequency short lines, demos, or brand moments, showing instructional and task text in full.

trigger.zh: 由用户主动播放或一次性场景进入触发，完整文本在 DOM 中始终可用。
trigger.en: Trigger from explicit playback or one-time scene entry while keeping complete text available in the DOM.

enterExit.zh: 字符按稳定节奏出现，标点可稍作停顿；离开时整体淡出。
enterExit.en: Reveal characters at a stable pace with optional punctuation pauses, and fade the whole line on exit.

interruptibility.zh: 重播先清晰重置；跳过操作立即显示完整文本。
interruptibility.en: Reset clearly before replay and reveal the complete text immediately on skip.

gestureRules.zh: 提供跳过或立即显示控件，键盘可操作；打字光标不抢占焦点。
gestureRules.en: Provide a keyboard-operable skip or reveal control, with the visual caret kept out of focus order.

reducedMotion.zh: 直接显示完整文本，保留静态光标或移除光标闪烁。
reducedMotion.en: Show the complete text immediately and keep a static caret or remove caret blinking.

reviewNotes.zh: 屏幕阅读器读取完整句子，避免逐字符播报。
reviewNotes.en: Expose the complete sentence to screen readers instead of character announcements.

reviewNotes.zh: 中文按字素簇切分，避免拆开 emoji 和组合字符。
reviewNotes.en: Segment by grapheme cluster so emoji and combined characters remain intact.
